problem_text_cn: 3-22 长平板在水平方向上以恒定的速度$v_0$朝右运动，板上方$H$高处有一小球自静止自由下落与平板碰撞。已知球与平板间摩擦因数$\mu=0.1$，小球反弹高度仍为$H$，试确定图3-25中小球反弹抛射角$\phi$的正切$\tan\phi$与$\sqrt{H}$之间的函数关系。
problem_text_en: 3-22 A long flat plate moves horizontally to the right with constant speed $v_0$. A small ball falls from rest at a height $H$ above the plate and collides with it. The coefficient of friction between the ball and the plate is $\mu=0.1$, and the ball rebounds to the same height $H$. Determine the functional relation between the tangent of the rebound angle $\phi$, $\tan\phi$, and $\sqrt{H}$, as shown in Figure 3-25.
problem_solution_cn:
解 碰撞时间$\Delta t_N$内正碰力平均值记为$\bar{N}$，小球受摩擦力作用时间记为$\Delta t_f$，必有$\Delta t_f\leqslant\Delta t_N$，$\Delta t_f$期间摩擦力平均值记为$\bar{f}$。碰撞前后小球竖直方向速度大小同为
$$ v_{\perp}=\sqrt{2gH}. $$
碰撞过程的冲量、动量关系为
$$ \bar{N}\Delta t_N=2mv_{\perp},\quad \bar{f}\Delta t_f=mv_f, $$
式中$m$是小球质量，$v_f$是小球碰后的水平速度。若是$\Delta t_f=\Delta t_N$，则可得
$$ \bar{f}=\mu\bar{N},\quad v_f=2\mu v_{\perp}=2\mu\sqrt{2gH}. $$
真实的$v_f$不可超过$v_0$，即要求
$$ 2\mu v_{\perp}\leqslant v_0, $$
故$\Delta t_f=\Delta t_N$的条件是
$$ v_0\geqslant 2\mu\sqrt{2gH}. $$
(1) 设$v_0\geqslant 2\mu\sqrt{2gH}=\dfrac{1}{5}\sqrt{2gH}$，则有
$$ \tan\phi=\frac{v_{\perp}}{v_f}=\frac{1}{2\mu}=5. $$
(2) 设$v_0<2\mu\sqrt{2gH}=\dfrac{1}{5}\sqrt{2gH}$，此时$\Delta t_f<\Delta t_N$，有
$$ v_f=v_0,\quad \tan\phi=\frac{v_{\perp}}{v_0}=\frac{\sqrt{2gH}}{v_0}. $$
problem_solution_en:
Solution Denote the average normal force during collision time $\Delta t_N$ as $\bar{N}$, the duration of friction on the ball as $\Delta t_f$ (with $\Delta t_f\leqslant\Delta t_N$), and the average friction force during $\Delta t_f$ as $\bar{f}$. The vertical speed of the ball before and after collision is
$$ v_{\perp}=\sqrt{2gH}. $$
The impulse–momentum relations for the collision are
$$ \bar{N}\Delta t_N=2mv_{\perp},\quad \bar{f}\Delta t_f=mv_f, $$
where $m$ is the mass of the ball, and $v_f$ is its horizontal velocity after collision. If $\Delta t_f=\Delta t_N$, then
$$ \bar{f}=\mu\bar{N},\quad v_f=2\mu v_{\perp}=2\mu\sqrt{2gH}. $$
The actual $v_f$ cannot exceed $v_0$, which requires
$$ 2\mu v_{\perp}\leqslant v_0. $$
Hence the condition for $\Delta t_f=\Delta t_N$ is
$$ v_0\geqslant 2\mu\sqrt{2gH}. $$
(1) If $v_0\geqslant 2\mu\sqrt{2gH}=\dfrac{1}{5}\sqrt{2gH}$, then
$$ \tan\phi=\frac{v_{\perp}}{v_f}=\frac{1}{2\mu}=5. $$
(2) If $v_0<2\mu\sqrt{2gH}=\dfrac{1}{5}\sqrt{2gH}$, then $\Delta t_f<\Delta t_N$ and we have
$$ v_f=v_0,\quad \tan\phi=\frac{v_{\perp}}{v_0}=\frac{\sqrt{2gH}}{v_0}. $$
img_cn: 图3-25示意图：长平板水平向右匀速运动，小球从高度H处自由下落，与平板碰撞后反弹。图中标注了反弹抛射角$\phi$、平板速度$v_0$、下落高度H等参数。

解题过程图：展示了详细的数学推导过程，包括碰撞时间$\Delta t_N$、摩擦力作用时间$\Delta t_f$、平均正碰力$\bar{N}$、平均摩擦力$\bar{f}$、动量与冲量关系$\bar{N}\Delta t_N=2mv_\perp$，$\bar{f}\Delta t_f=mv_f$，以及分情况讨论$v_0$与$2\mu\sqrt{2gH}$大小关系的结论。最后得出$\tan\phi$与$\sqrt{H}$的函数关系。
img_en: Figure 3-25 schematic: A long flat plate moves horizontally to the right with constant speed $v_0$. A small ball falls from height H, collides with the plate, and rebounds. The figure labels the rebound angle $\phi$, plate velocity $v_0$, drop height H, etc.

Solution process diagram: Shows the detailed mathematical derivation, including collision time $\Delta t_N$, friction duration $\Delta t_f$, average normal force $\bar{N}$, average friction force $\bar{f}$, momentum‑impulse relations $\bar{N}\Delta t_N=2mv_\perp$, $\bar{f}\Delta t_f=mv_f$, and the two cases depending on the comparison between $v_0$ and $2\mu\sqrt{2gH}$. Finally, the functional relation between $\tan\phi$ and $\sqrt{H}$ is given.
